# MegaHUD

> Real-time opponent intelligence for Poker Now.

MegaHUD is a Chrome extension that provides a professional-grade heads-up display (HUD) overlay for pokernow.com and pokernow.club. It tracks live poker statistics, rates opponent exploitability, and automates preflop folding decisions.

## Product

- Chrome Extension (Manifest V3)
- Available on the Chrome Web Store
- Works on pokernow.com and pokernow.club
- Supports NLH, PLO4, PLO5, and DBBPLO
- Fish tier (free) + Megalodon tier ($24.99/4 weeks, 7-day free trial)

## Fish Features (Free)

- VPIP%, PFR%, 3-Bet%, C-Bet% live stats
- Average Lead and Average Raise sizing
- Position tracking (2-10 players, auto-detected)
- Stealth Mode toggle (Shift+H) to hide overlays
- HUD position customization
- Local IndexedDB storage
- Dynamic context-aware reminders
- Auto game type and stake detection
- Bomb pot and walk detection

## Megalodon Features (Paid)

- Cloud sync across 3 devices via Google OAuth
- Advanced stats: Fold to C-Bet%, Check-Raise%, Aggression Factor (AF), WTSD%, WWSF
- Additional stats: Fold to 3-Bet%, Donk Bet%, Squeeze%, River Checkback%, Inelasticity Index
- 30-hand quality gate before displaying stats
- Auto-Fold Engine with 13x13 hand matrix and position-based ranges (Shift+A to toggle)
- Exploitability Rating: 1-10 leak scoring based on 8 weighted factors
- Lifetime Ledger with cloud-synced deduplication (Shift+L to cycle views)
- Audio alerts for premium hands (AA/KK/QQ/AKs), big pot rumble, and squeeze detection (works when tab is muted)
- Expandable stat ribbon per player with full stat matrix
- Positional stat breakdowns
- Priority support

## Keyboard Shortcuts

- Shift+H — Toggle Stealth Mode (hide/show HUD)
- Shift+P — Toggle Positional stats (ALL vs POS)
- Shift+L — Cycle Ledger mode (Off / Lifetime / Game) (Megalodon)
- Shift+A — Toggle Auto-Fold engine (Megalodon)
- Shift+S — Toggle Stakes mode (current stake vs all stakes)
- Shift+E — Expand/collapse all HUD panels

## Installation

MegaHUD is available on the Chrome Web Store:

1. Install from the Chrome Web Store
2. Click the MegaHUD icon in the toolbar to configure settings and sign in
3. Visit any Poker Now table — the HUD activates automatically

## Contact

- Email: support@megahud.com
